Stihl
Loading Stihl data…
📋
Stihl pricing file not loaded
Upload a Stihl_Pricing_*.xlsx to see the full parts catalog (~367 SKUs). Units from the main inventory file will still display.
📦
Stihl parts inventory not loaded
Upload a Stihl_Inventory_*.xlsx to see on-hand quantities for parts. Pricing alone will still show — stock will read 0.
Type ↕ Code / Model ↕ Part # / Tag ↕ Description ↕ Category ↕ Yr ↕ Loc ↕ MSRP ↕ Promo ↕ Cost ↕ Stock ↕
📦
No Stihl data yet
Upload Stihl_Inventory_*.xlsx and Stihl_Pricing_*.xlsx above,
or drop them into Brand Files / Stihl / in Drive and refresh.
